ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-01-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 3/13/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 3/3/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 45 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED 30 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: BOB BALIAN, CSR #5220

Tonya R. Draeger for defendant and DB Riley

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted:
Defendants Certainteed Corporation, Ford Motor Company, General Motors Corporation and Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for a protective order is granted. Defendants may proceed with the deposition in the manner deemed most efficient by counsel for defendants. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. The request to deem the deposition completed is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
